title: andropogon hirtiflorus var. genuinus
intro: Andropogon hirtiflorus var. genuinus, also known as East Indian bitter grass, is a type of plant species native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and indigestion. The health benefits associated with East Indian bitter grass include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be made into a powder or tincture for medicinal use.
